subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-15 in London
subcodes.first_line: What conspicuous glory has God deigned to bestow upon us Persians! How great is this prosperity, which is even as a mighty sun
subcodes.first_line_orig: خدا چه عزتی بما ایرانیان عنایت فرمود چه آفتاب بزرگی و سعادتی از افق مشرق زمین طالع
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @past, present and future of Iran, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement
